chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 1058 of 2021 Date Order with Signature of Hon’ble Judge Hearing of cases (Priority) 1. For orders on Office objection at Flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of CMA No.4751/2021 (S/A) 3. For hearing of main case 17.11.2022 Mr. Ashfaque Hussain Abro, Assistant Attorney General Mr. Ghulam Abbas Akhtar, Advocate for Respondents /SEPCO <><><><>..<><><><> Mr. Ghulam Mujtaba Jakhar, Advocate, holding brief on behalf of Mr. Muhammad Qayyum Arain, learned counsel for the petitioner, requests for adjournment on the ground that the latter is unwell. In this petition vide order dated 29.07.2021 directions was given to respondents 7 and 8 to decide the complaint as well as application filed by the petitioner within 20 days. Through instant petition, the petitioner has impugned the alleged excess units of his Tube Well connection. As per comments filed by respondent No.8 (Electric Inspector, Sukkur) the petitioner has not approached him for redressal of his grievance. We, therefore, disposed of this petition with direction to petitioner that in case he has still grievance by the alleged detection, he may recourse the remedy available to him before the Electric Inspector, Sukkur under the Electricity Act. Judge Judge ARBROHI
